title: Pomodoro Countdown Timer

statement.markdown:
## Interactive Pomodoro Countdown Timer

Build a Pomodoro timer component allowing users to set a timer, play, pause, and reset progress.

### Requirements:
1. **Time display**: Format remaining seconds into a `MM:SS` layout (e.g. `25:00`).
2. **Play/Pause controls**: Play button starts counting down second by second. Clicking pause suspends countdown. Toggle display buttons dynamically.
3. **Custom durations & Reset**: Input allows setting custom durations in minutes. Reset button loads the active custom duration value, stops the ticking timer, and restores default UI styles.

constraints: Must correctly formats values (e.g. prefixing single digits with 0)
Must clean up timers on reset and prevent multiple concurrent timers running

starterCode.html: 25:00

gradingCriteria.description: Verify timer ticks down accurately and stops at 00:00.
Verify custom duration configurations load correctly and resets stop ticking timers.
